Bash(python -c "from PIL import Image; print\('Pillow:', Image.__version__\)")

PowerShell(git commit -m "docs: add full task spec \(FELADATLEIRAS.md\) as reference" 2>&1)
PowerShell(git commit -m "docs: add project-local CLAUDE.md \(auto-loaded reference in every Claude Code window\)" 2>&1)

PowerShell(npx kill-port 3000 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 1; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; "---Lokál push---"; $env:DATABASE_URL="postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5433/oktatas?schema=public"; $env:DIRECT_URL="postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5433/oktatas?schema=public"; pnpm db:push 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5; "---Supabase push---"; $env:DATABASE_URL="postgresql://postgres.cfngfevjdpnnznotjedb:.%25yrfM7%267q5ApFM@aws-0-eu-west-1.pooler.supabase.com:6543/postgres?pgbouncer=true"; $env:DIRECT_URL="postgresql://postgres.cfngfevjdpnnznotjedb:.%25yrfM7%267q5ApFM@aws-0-eu-west-1.pooler.supabase.com:5432/postgres"; pnpm --filter @repo/db exec prisma db push --skip-generate 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 4)
PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 3000,3001,3002,4000 } | Select-Object LocalPort,OwningProcess | Format-Table)

PowerShell($ready = $false; $attempts = 0; while \(-not $ready -and $attempts -lt 30\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/login" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2 -ErrorAction Stop; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { $ready = $true } } catch { Start-Sleep 2; $attempts++ } }; if \($ready\) { "Ready on 3000" } else { "Not ready" })
